knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active theory/iDo/weDo from packet.

exercises.code:
nodes = [{"role": "link", "name": "Inicio", "id": "n1"}]
print(next(x["id"] for x in nodes if x["role"] == "link" and x["name"] == "Inicio"))

preferred = ["role", "testid", "css"]
print(sorted(["css", "role", "testid"], key=lambda s: preferred.index(s)))

expected, actual = "Portal demo", "Portal demo"
print("pass" if expected == actual else "fail")

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha256(b"data").hexdigest()[:8])

state = {"token": "t"}
print("reuse" if state.get("token") else "login")

state = "anonymous"
state = "authenticated"
print(state)
print(sorted({"trace": "a.zip", "screenshot": "b.png", "error": "x"}.keys()))
print([x for x in ["ok", "ERR timeout", "nav"] if "ERR" in x])

exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints attach trace if not ok.

exercises.code:
err = "stale"
print("goto_home" if err == "stale" else "continue")

api = True
print("api" if api else "rpa")

f = {"api": False, "export": True, "rpa": True}
print("api" if f["api"] else "export" if f["export"] else "rpa" if f["rpa"] else "human")
print({"method": "rpa", "reason": "no_api"})

sig = {"tos_forbidden": True, "captcha": True}
print("abort" if sig.get("tos_forbidden") else "human_handoff" if sig.get("captcha") else "continue")
print({"url": "https://demo.example.pe/x", "step": "export", "screenshot": "s.png"})
